codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior watch-alert failure. App.jsx now drives watch matching and new-data detection from `canonicalNews` instead of filtered `activeNews`, and the new regression tests cover the effect wiring, dependency tracking, ref updates, and a functional example showing why the full dataset is required.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The scrutiny-validator skill should document a manual-review fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail because the current subagent path can still terminate before producing any report.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: This osint-advanced rerun again failed to launch `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` due to `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, so the fix reviews had to be completed manually despite the skill only specifying the Task-based workflow.

summary: Pass. Watch matching now runs against the unfiltered canonical event set, so active UI filters no longer suppress watch counts or notifications.
